idea-plugin.name: Apple Container
idea-plugin.description:
Apple Container (github.com/apple/container) as a connection in the Services tool window. Manage the container engine and inspect what it is running without leaving the IDE.
  • Add via the Services view's + popup: Apple Container…
  • Start/stop the container engine; see its status, version and kernel.
  • Browse containers and images; run a container from an image.
  • Copy a container's IP address or id from the tree.
Requires the container CLI (1.0.0+) installed on macOS. Machine management lands in a later version.

action.description: Manage the Apple Container engine in the Services tool window
